title: rochelia zeylanica
intro: Rochelia zeylanica, also known as the Ceylon rochelia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, and it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rochelia zeylanica include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. It is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it can also be found in various Ayurvedic remedies and supplements.
